1. DEFINITIONS

For the purposes of this circular, the following terms shall have the meanings
ascribed to them under the applicable Reserve Bank of India framework.

1.1 "Regulated Entity" means any bank, NBFC, or payment institution regulated
by the Reserve Bank of India under the applicable Acts.

1.2 "KYC" means Know Your Customer, which requires verification of customer
identity before opening an account or creating a lending relationship.

2. APPLICABILITY

These directions apply to all regulated entities that issue savings accounts,
credit products, or payment instruments within India.

3. CUSTOMER IDENTIFICATION

Entities must obtain proof of identity and proof of address before account
activation unless a permitted simplified due diligence exception applies.
